creator: ahicks@p-o.co.uk
text:
Created attachment 236335
Upgrade mythtv family from 31 to 32

Poudriere logs:
https://p-o.co.uk/downloads/mythtv-32.0.60,1.log (3.4Mb)
https://p-o.co.uk/downloads/mythtv-frontend-32.0.60_3,1.log (2.7M)
https://p-o.co.uk/downloads/mythplugin-mythmusic-32.0.60.log (248K)
https://p-o.co.uk/downloads/mythplugin-mythweb-32.0.40.log (20k)

In addition to a version bump, freetype2 pulls in pulls in archivers/brotli that adds -I/usr/local/include
This causes issues as the locally installed ffmpeg is seen before the one included with and required by mythtv
